prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, Yuna Dawncrest, a masculine mage in layered blue robes with floating spell tags, stands before a volatile magical fire, weaving a glowing blue arcane barrier with precise hand movements; Yuna Moonvale, an androgynous ranger in a green half-cape with a leaf brooch, stands close by, alert and observant, preparing to assist. Cinematic lighting, high-quality RPG aesthetic, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild forge shot, Yuna Dawncrest maintains the arcane barrier, and Yuna Moonvale steps forward to coordinate, using a field tool to dampen the magical flames; the two agents work in perfect physical synchronization to contain the fire, their movements fluid and collaborative. Consistent camera angle and lighting, no text, no watermark.
